anomalies.draftedAction: M-102 stopped ~3min at 08:03Z, 63% util consistent with cyclic interruptions (likely planned tool change or operator chip-clear/in-process gauging) rather than crash—no spindle-overload or alarm indicators in frames and no debris/collision signature. Next: dispatch operator to confirm M-102 is in MDI/tool-change hold vs. faulted; check controller for active alarm code and verify spindle/turret position. If no operator present within 2 min or alarm active, escalate to supervisor and tag for maintenance; if planned tool change, log expected restart and clear.
anomalies.briefing: 08:03Z M-102 lathe stopped ~3min (util 63%)—probable planned tool change/operator hold, no crash signature; operator dispatched to confirm alarm-free restart, escalate if faulted.
